title: carlina hispanica subsp. major
intro: Carlina hispanica subsp. major, also known as the Salsify or Meadow Salsify, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), characterized by its yellow or purple flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Carlina hispanica subsp. major include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its traditional use in treating various health issues. The health benefits of consuming this plant include improved digestion, reduced blood sugar levels, and enhanced immune function. The herbal preparations of Carlina hispanica subsp. major include teas, infusions, and dried root extracts, which can be consumed in various forms to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
